---
name: Feature request / Enhancement
about: Suggest a new feature, prompt improvement, or pipeline enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
One-sentence description of the proposed change.

## Motivation
Why is this useful for the project? How does it help produce a more professional final video?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the change you'd like to see. Include:
- Which part of the pipeline it affects (prompts, generation, audio, assembly, docs, etc.)
- Any specific chapters or components

## Alternatives Considered
Other ways this could be achieved?

## Additional Context
Examples, references to the original Manim Evolution Story, or mockups are welcome.

## Checklist
- [ ] This would improve the final cinematic quality or educational value
- [ ] I have checked that this doesn't already exist in the codebase or issues
